name: Impossible Pumpkin Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Beat all ingredients except pecans and topping in a blender or with a hand mixer until smooth (1 minute).
4. Stir in the pecans.
5. Pour into the prepared pie plate.
6. Bake for 50-55 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Mix the cool whip well with the pumpkin pie spice.
8. Spread over the cooled pie.
9. Garnish with additional chopped pecans if desired.
